# WuBuOS — Battleship v5 (Triple DA + Name Parity + Third-Party Audit)

**Methodology**: Behavioral verification + stub hunt + name parity audit + third-party dep scan
**Generated by**: Triple Devil's Advocate sweep after stub/form/name-parity/third-party hunts
**Current state**: 34 C files, ~13K real LOC, 468+ tests, cells 200✅, 203✅

## Resolved Cells

| Cell | Description | Evidence |
|------|-------------|----------|
| 200 | ZealOS kernel in-process + Win98 GUI shell | hosted.c:194 init, hosted_test.c 6 behavioral |
| 203 | Fork+exec for .wubu containers | wubu_host_exec.c:191 fork+chroot+execv, test 15 behavioral |

## Name Parity Audit

| Subsystem | ZealOS funcs | Our funcs | Parity % | Missing |
|-----------|-------------|-----------|----------|---------|
| Memory | 17 | 7 | 41% | 10 (BlkPool*, Mem32Dev*, Mem64Dev*, etc.) |
| Task | 21 | 10 | 47% | 11 (BirthWait↔task_block partial, DeathWait/Kill/Exit missing) |
| Display | 4 | 0 | 0% | 4 (LFBFlush, RawPutChar, WinDerivedValsUpdate, WinInside) |
| FAT32 | 18 | 15 | 83% | 3 (FAT32AllocClus, FAT32AllocContiguousClus, CDate2Dos) |
| **Types** | **190** | **16** | **8%** | **174 types** |

**Parity fix applied**: `zealos_parity.h` — #define aliases mapping ZealOS PascalCase → C11 snake_case + ZealOS primitive types (U0/I64/U8/etc → void/int64_t/uint8_t/etc)

## Third-Party Dependencies → C Replacement Roadmap

| Dependency | Used By | C Replacement | Cell |
|------------|---------|---------------|------|
| libX11 (-lX11) | hosted.c | DRM/KMS (wubu_display.h) | 380 |
| libm (-lm) | WorldSim, VBE tests | Pure C (wubu_math.h) | 381 |
| NanoShellOS naming | wm_nano/* | Rename to WuBuOS naming | 382 |

## Active Gap Cells (v5 — fresh from Triple DA sweep)

### Layer 1: Kernel — Hollow Stubs

| Cell | Description | Severity | Source |
|------|-------------|----------|--------|
| 300 | input.c: entire file empty — no keyboard/mouse queue, no event dispatch | 🔴 | input.c:13-52 |
| 301 | interrupt.c: IDT/PIC empty { } — no ISR registration, no IRQ routing | 🔴 | interrupt.c:16-37 |
| 303 | tasking.c: no timer tick, no context switch, no preemption | 🔴 | tasking.c:11-240 |
| 304 | fat32.c: directory entry update on close is TODO | 🟡 | fat32.c:845 |
| 305 | Name parity: 174 ZealOS types missing from our C structs | 🟡 | zealos_parity.h (8% type coverage) |
| 306 | Name parity: 25+ ZealOS kernel functions have no C equivalent | 🟡 | zealos_parity.h |

| 311 | holyc_codegen: no function calls with args, no struct layout, no string literals | 🔴 | holyc_codegen.c |

## Priority Order

1. **Cell 310** — codegen → unblocks 201 → 202 → 206 → 207
2. **Cell 311** — codegen function calls/structs
3. **Cell 324** — DELETE VSL (712 lines dead)
4. **Cell 330** — replace Proton with host Wine
5. **Cell 340/341/343/344** — route exec through wubu_host_exec
6. **Cell 300** — input queue (needs C implementation)
7. **Cell 303** — tasking (needs ucontext or setjmp)
8. **Cell 380** — DRM/KMS display (X11 replacement)
9. **Cell 381** — pure C math (wire wubu_math.h)
